In a rondeau over medium-low heat, add oil, onions and salt and saute until sweated and transluscent. Stir occasionally.
Reduce heat to low and continue cooking, adding water as necessary to prevent over browning.  Stir occasionally.
Cook until onions are very soft, caramelized, and excess moisture has evaporated.  Should be sweat and rich in flavor and odor.
Cool on sheet tray in blast chiller, then reserve to quart containers.
